title: Edit Item updates via Zapier
excerpt:
I’m trying to use Zapier to add updates while creating a new item on a particular board. 
How is this possible?

posts.author: StefanFaaStrak (Stefan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to use Zapier to add updates while creating a new item on a particular board.

How is this possible?

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @StefanFaaStrak

You can use the “Create update in monday.com” action to populate an item on a new item . You can chain this together with the new item action, and pass the item ID from the previous action to this one:

image1848×1574 152 KB

Let me know if that helps!

posts.author: Patm19 (Pat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @dipro,

Can you explain how to pass the item ID from the previous action to this one? Thank you
